creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
I would just like to mention that I have already submitted a patch for this
port under PR ports/115188 and a couple other things.  Firstly, the author
of Scintilla and SciTE has mentioned that support for GTK+1 has been removed
from SciTE due to them needing features of GTK+2 and the overhead of trying
to impliment GTK+1 alternatives to those was too great to continue the need
to support it.  Secondly, this patch does not take into account the patch I
have made to the Scintilla port to check if Scintilla was built with GTK2 as
well, because both ports need to be built with the same version of GTK.

Thanks,
Naram Qashat
